description: A 3-column grid (1-column on mobile) of 'Action Cards'. Each card features a giant 64x64 icon in the center-top. Colors: Soil Health (Brown), Weather (Blue), Mandi (Green). Cards use ui/card.tsx with a 'hover-lift' effect. Text is minimal: 1 Bold Title and 1 Short Subtitle. Entire card is clickable for easy thumb access on mobile devices.
